name: Mauka Ya Dhokha
overview: Beware what you wish for. As some wishes do come true that will topple your life, forever. 'Mauka ya Dhokha' is an edge-on-the-seat murder mystery thriller, set in scenic Goa, driven by love, greed and betrayal.

trailers.title: Mauka Ya Dhokha (Official Trailer) Hungama Original Show | Samiksha B, Aabhas M, Himanshu M
